texto: I used to think people were like lighthouses. That they were yhere to protect you. But they're no. People are lime whirlpools. They pull you in
autor: they drag you under. You have to work so hard just to keep your head above water.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a they drag you under. You have to work so hard just to keep your head above water.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “I used to think people were like lighthouses. That they were yhere to protect you. But they're no…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, lang-leav, sad-girls pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de sad-girls.
